title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development DSWD) - Field Office Iv-a with Regard to the Supplementary Feeding Program (SFP) As Contribution to the Dswd?s Early Childhood Care and Development (ECCD) Program and Ratifying the Same Thereafter.
